name: testTheVisibilityOfTheCardTypeOptions
description: Verify that user can see 'Card type' options
descriptionHtml: Verify that user can see 'Card type' options

steps.name: Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: Verify that user can see 'Card type' options

steps.name: Verify: Payment Method Options are visible
Verify: Default selected option in Payment Method Options is 'ALL'
